News 23 April 2026 Shabana joins launch of Labour’s plan for Birmingham Shabana with the Leader of Birmingham City Council, Councillor John Cotton, and Labour candidates. News 20 April 2026 Millions in funding for major upgrades at city colleges Photo for illustrative purposes used under Creative Commons license. Credit: South and City College. News 17 April 2026 Shabana welcomes Young Futures Hub for Birmingham Shabana has been working with organisations supporting young people in Birmingham. News 15 April 2026 Shabana welcomes £3.9 million funding boost for iconic Birmingham arts venues Shabana has always championed Birmingham's creative and cultural heritage. News 14 April 2026 £1million enforcement boost after Shabana’s campaigning Shabana has been campaigning with Labour's candidates for more mobile CCTV cameras. News 08 April 2026 Shabana joins local election campaign launch Shabana with members of the Cabinet at the local elections launch. News 31 March 2026 Shabana visits Masterchef studios in Digbeth Shabana with the production team at Masterchef studios. News 23 March 2026 Shabana celebrates huge Birmingham parks investment Shabana with Councillor Mariam Khan, Ansar Ali Khan and local park stakeholders. News 16 March 2026 Shabana thanks residents for Advice Centre success Shabana meeting residents at her Newtown Advice Centre. News 16 February 2026 Shabana launches petition for mobile CCTV cameras News 09 February 2026 Shabana welcomes £20 million for Nechells at Pride in Place roundtable Shabana with local residents and community groups celebrating Pride in Place funding. News 05 February 2026 Shabana launches petition to re-open neighbourhood office Shabana launched the petition with candidates Sally Benton and Satvir Dosanjh. News 27 January 2026 Put bobbies back on the beat, not in the office – Shabana Shabana is ring-fencing funding for neighbourhood officers. News 23 January 2026 Shabana breaks ground on £95,000 investment in Bordesley Green Shabana breaking ground with Obayed Hussain and young people. News Press 20 January 2026 Shabana writes to committee chair on Ladywood regeneration Shabana's longstanding red lines on the regeneration to hold the council to account.
